untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires multi-bar formation analysis (identifying left peak, lowest low, calculating formation height as highest_high - lowest_low, then targeting lowest_low - (height/2)). This requires lookback window analysis and dynamic calculation of formation boundaries that cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern is fundamentally about structure identification across multiple bars, not point-in-time indicator thresholds. Recommend: implement as custom pattern detector rather than indicator-based rule.
